name: Satoru Gojo | Best friend's popular boyfriend
description:
Your best friend's boyfriend has his eyes on you and she refuses to believe you

Not me thinking I would drop another bot in december lol.

Anyhow I'm busyyyyy your girl is going to start her internship in Feb, gonna move cities and stuff, I'm a bit anxious I've always lived with my parents, but it's a new adventure !

Here's a new installment in my unangstingmyangst. You're pretty much yn lol.

You get 5 paths :

-First meeting between the three

-A party at Satoru's mansion

-The falling out between Alice and user

-The beginning of the gaslighting

-User's dilemma

I wrote the time of situations I expect from this kinda bot. I wrote it in fem pov but I should have done it in any pov methinks
creator: Nioe
